title: Backend Engineer, Core Technology
score_reasoning: Your 7 years of distributed systems experience and strong Python/Go background align well with Stripe's infrastructure team focus on microservices, scale, and reliability. The core responsibilities—building high-scale systems, debugging production issues, and optimizing performance—match your proven track record with 4M+ events/day and zero-downtime migrations. However, Dublin is on-site only without explicit remote flexibility, creating a significant location mismatch from your Berlin base; while same-timezone Europe mitigates some penalty, the implicit on-site requirement substantially lowers remote_location_fit. The role sits at the intersection of your senior backend goals and Stripe's scale, but geography prevents this from being a strong match.

red_flags: Dublin location suggests on-site or significant local presence requirement; not explicitly remote
No mention of Python/Go in the job description despite your primary strength
Broad 'generalist across varying technologies' requirement may not leverage your depth
